name: Thai Style Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, chicken stock powder, chicken flavor sachet, and fish sauce in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cook uncovered on high for 12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the cooked chicken to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the sliced mushrooms and noodles. Continue cooking uncovered on high for 3 more minutes, or until the noodles are tender (stirring halfway through).
5. Remove from heat and stir in the sliced spring onions and chopped fresh coriander.
6. Serve garnished with sliced red chili.
